prompt: Design a storage stair module for a loft bed: 3 stairs, 16" step height, 12" step depth, 36" wide, pine and plywood, knockdown connection to bed frame

context.notes: Tier 3 full integration test. Module must connect to bed frame via bolt+barrel nut knockdown hardware. Internal structure uses dadoes for dividers and shelves. Pocket screws for within-module assembly where dadoes are impractical. Each stair step forms a cubby with storage below. Hardware schedule must specify bolt sizes, barrel nut quantities, and locations. Module breakdown must describe how this connects to the larger loft bed system.
